final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a feminine skincare brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a full-width landing page layout with: header bar at top, three-column hero section (left copy column / center model / right product column), and a bottom benefit-card row
Subject: must include all of the following:
  Center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Right column: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box; 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents
  Left column: headline, subheadline, 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons, 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, trust badge line
  Bottom: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy indoor backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused feminine lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink, white, and purple (purple flowers as floral accent elements)
Materials/textures: needs a light, clean digital UI surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following text elements exactly as written:
  Header logo: "LUMEA BEAUTY"
  Navigation links (5): "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"
  Header CTA button: "今すぐ試す"
  Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
  Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
  Feature badges (3 pill-shaped): "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
  Bullet points (3, pink checkmarks): "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
  CTA buttons (2): "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"
  Trust badge line: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Stat cards (3 floating): "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Benefit cards (3): "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all Japanese text verbatim; all UI components (header, hero columns, stat cards, benefit cards, badges, bullets, buttons) must be clearly legible and spatially distinct
Avoid:
